NOT REPORTED.(506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-14-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-14-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT FGWENDOLYN MAY WONG IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WONG, GWENDOLYN MAY $259.21 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $339.21 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
